title: alyssum repens var. scardicum
intro: Alyssum repens var. scardicum, also known as lesser celery, is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family, with a delicate fragrance and edible leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and combat infections. The health benefits of Alyssum repens var. scardicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of nausea, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
